page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m4.large is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with an Intel Xeon processor running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 2 dedicated physical cores and 2 vCPUs, operating at 1.0 thread per core, which ensures dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading. It is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include any local storage or bundled GPUs, requiring external block storage for operating system and application data. Network connectivity is limited to a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The lack of hyperthreading and local storage represents a tradeoff, positioning this instance for workloads that require predictable, dedicated CPU execution rather than high-throughput parallel processing or local disk I/O.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.u2i-c1m4.large offers a balanced resource density for entry-level dedicated workloads. The 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes it suitable for general-purpose applications, small-scale web serving, lightweight databases, and basic utility services that do not demand high-performance storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m4.large is an x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM, running on an Intel Xeon processor at 2.7 GHz. Utilizing the KVM hypervisor, it provides a dedicated CPU allocation with 1.0 thread per core. The instance includes no local storage or GPU resources, relying entirely on network-attached storage, and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. With a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this server is designed for predictable, entry-level workloads. It is best suited for general-purpose applications, lightweight web serving, and small database instances that do not require high-throughput local I/O or parallel processing capabilities.
